id.description: Internally used unique identification of the transaction

arrangementId.description: Reference to the product to which the transaction belongs

reference.description: A tag/label issued by the initiator of the transaction in order to be able to refer to the respective transaction

typeGroup.description: Bank specific code of the group the transaaction type belangs to this to be mapped to in integration

type.description: Bank specific code to be mapped to generic type in integration

bookingDate.description: The date the amount is posted to the balance of an account from a book keeping perspective.

valueDate.description: The date on which an amount posted to an account becomes interest bearing

amount.description: The amount of the transaction @deprecated since 2.13.0, please use transactionAmountCurrency

currency.description: The amount of the transaction @deprecated since 2.13.0, please use transactionAmountCurrency

creditDebitIndicator.description: Indicates whether the amount is credited or debited.

instructedAmount.description: Only present if the transaction currency<>account currency. @deprecated since 2.13.0, please use instructedAmountCurrency

instructedCurrency.description: The alpha-3 code (complying with ISO 4217) of the currency that qualifies the amount. @deprecated since 2.13.0, please use instructedAmountCurrency

amount.description: The amount in the specified currency

currencyCode.description: The alpha-3 code (complying with ISO 4217) of the currency that qualifies the amount

instructedAmountCurrency.description: Only present if the transaction currency<>account currency
instructedAmountCurrency.title: Monetary Amount

amount.description: The amount in the specified currency

currencyCode.description: The alpha-3 code (complying with ISO 4217) of the currency that qualifies the amount

currencyExchangeRate.description: The exchange rate (between both account and transaction currency) that was used for the conversion. To be used if those currencies are not the same

counterPartyAccountNumber.description: The International Bank Account Number of the counterparty

counterPartyBankName.description: The bank name of the counterparty

creditorId.description: Id of the creditor (Only for SEPA DD)

checkSerialNumber.description: Serial number of the check. Each check has a different number for identification purposes.

runningBalance.description: Indicates the balance of the account at that moment when the transaction was executed
